title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.670 - Aiding in violation of sections 532.650 and 532.660, misdemeanor
text:
532.670.  Aiding in violation of sections 532.650 and 532.660, misdemeanor. — Every person who shall knowingly aid or assist in the violation of section 532.650 or 532.660 shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 1652) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1488; 1919 § 1938; 1909 § 2503
